heading: (Optional) Optimize Connection to Sharded Clusters Behind a Private Endpoint for AWS
body:
Atlas can generate an optimized SRV (DNS Service Record) connection string for sharded
clusters using the load balancers from your private endpoint
service. When you use an optimized connection string, Atlas limits
the number of connections per `mongos` between your application and
your sharded cluster. The limited connections per `mongos`
improve performance during spikes in connection counts.

Atlas doesn't support optimized connection strings for
clusters that run on Google Cloud or Azure (Microsoft Azure). To learn more about optimized
connection strings for sharded clusters behind a private
endpoint, see [How can I optimize connection performance for sharded clusters using private endpoints?](optimized-connection-strings).

> **See Also:** [Connect to Atlas using a Private Endpoint](connect-private-endpoint)
